sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92312" key="r(eustale/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥευσ-τᾰλέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n92312.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">liquid, fluent</tr_>, Orac. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
